nasb.text: The sons of Asher according to their families: of Imnah, the family of the Imnites; of Ishvi, the family of the Ishvites; of Beriah, the family of the Beriites.

esv.text: The sons of Asher according to their clans: of Imnah, the clan of the Imnites; of Ishvi, the clan of the Ishvites; of Beriah, the clan of the Beriites.

cnv.text: 亞設的子孫，按著他們的家族，屬音拿的，有音拿家族；屬亦施葦的，有亦施葦家族；屬比利亞的，有比利亞家族。

ccb.text: 亚设的子孙有音拿族、亦施韦族和比利亚族。
